news.Title: 台積電破2,000元大關！這11檔主動式台股ETF 跟著活跳跳
news.Content:
台積電衝破2,000元大關，推升台股再創歷史新高35,400點，根據CMoney資料統計，11檔主動式台股ETF全都持有台積電，2月份以來台積電股價一路由1,775元，衝到25日收盤2,015元，主動台股ETF也檔檔表現亮眼，其中又以持有台積電比重前三名的，依序為主動第一金台股優(00994A)、主動野村台灣50(00985A)、主動復華未來50(00991A)，2月份漲幅依序為11.69％、9.51％、8.63％。
台積電持有比重在9％以上則有，主動野村臺灣優選、主動統一台股增長、主動中信台灣卓越，及主動台新優勢成長等，2月份漲幅亦分別達9.82％、11.53％、11.65％，及12.70％，表現亦位居領先群，法人表示，這波台股主動ETF擁神山護底氣，再加上選股能力加持，較台積電占比動輒達3成至7成的被動式台股ETF這波也僅在1成上下，表現旗鼓相當，未來一旦進入繁花齊開、類股輪動階段，主動台股ETF更具備投資優勢。
主動第一金台股優(00994A)經理人張正中分析，美高科技大廠財報陸續公佈後，市場反應劇烈，現階段高估值環境下，投資人關心科技大廠發展的AI變現能力與投資回報成果。
張正中看好整體台股，仍將持續受惠於國際科技大廠資本支出增加，企業獲利成長動能，今年企業獲利成長預估值已上修至年增20％以上，中長線趨勢持續看好，AI供應鏈、半導體先進製程仍是相對看好產業，張正中強調，今年採取強趨勢選股的投資策略，更能把握住台股成長動能。

news.Title: 台積電破2,000元大關！這11檔主動式台股ETF 跟著活跳跳
news.Content:
台積電衝破2,000元大關，推升台股再創歷史新高35,400點，根據CMoney資料統計，11檔主動式台股ETF全都持有台積電，2月份以來台積電股價一路由1,775元，衝到25日收盤2,015元，主動台股ETF也檔檔表現亮眼，其中又以持有台積電比重前三名的，依序為主動第一金台股優(00994A)、主動野村台灣50(00985A)、主動復華未來50(00991A)，2月份漲幅依序為11.69％、9.51％、8.63％。
台積電持有比重在9％以上則有，主動野村臺灣優選、主動統一台股增長、主動中信台灣卓越，及主動台新優勢成長等，2月份漲幅亦分別達9.82％、11.53％、11.65％，及12.70％，表現亦位居領先群，法人表示，這波台股主動ETF擁神山護底氣，再加上選股能力加持，較台積電占比動輒達3成至7成的被動式台股ETF這波也僅在1成上下，表現旗鼓相當，未來一旦進入繁花齊開、類股輪動階段，主動台股ETF更具備投資優勢。
主動第一金台股優(00994A)經理人張正中分析，美高科技大廠財報陸續公佈後，市場反應劇烈，現階段高估值環境下，投資人關心科技大廠發展的AI變現能力與投資回報成果。
張正中看好整體台股，仍將持續受惠於國際科技大廠資本支出增加，企業獲利成長動能，今年企業獲利成長預估值已上修至年增20％以上，中長線趨勢持續看好，AI供應鏈、半導體先進製程仍是相對看好產業，張正中強調，今年採取強趨勢選股的投資策略，更能把握住台股成長動能。

news.Title: 統一期貨：台積電、台達電上漲2-4%，帶動台指期連兩日大漲
news.Content: 【財訊快報／編輯部】台灣前兩大權值股台積電、台達電上漲2-4%，帶動台指期連兩日大漲800點。由於台積電近期漲勢顯著，已被證交所列為注意股，為史上第五次發生。惟前三次歷史經驗，被列注意股後，台積電股價皆見趨勢轉折，留意此次是否複製。綜觀法人籌碼，三大法人合計買超425.5億元，其中外資買超413億元，而自營商賣超38.3億元，投信則買超50.8億元。檢視選擇權金流，外資布局0.21億元偏多部位，自營商則布局0.46億元偏空部位。選擇權未平倉部分，3月F4週選價平近9檔賣權最大未平倉上升500點至35,000點，買權最大未平倉上升800點至36,000點，最大OI區間上移偏多。期貨方面，外資夜盤加碼1,000口空單，日盤則大幅加碼6,122口空單，未平倉淨空單增至-35,583口；十大特定法人大幅加碼4,818口空單至-6,180口。

news.Title: 元富期貨：台積電突破2000元大關，加權指數大漲2.05%
news.Content:
【財訊快報／編輯部】美股方面，投資人觀望美國總統川普即將發表的國情諮文，加上Meta宣布與超微(AMD)達成合作協議，市場氣氛正向、對人工智慧(AI)泡沫化的擔憂降溫，美國股市24日反彈，道瓊工業指數盤中一度揚升491點，終場四大指數齊紅。值得關注的是，伊朗與美國預計週四在日內瓦舉行第三輪核談判，隨著華府尋求終結伊朗核計畫，市場對軍事衝突風險的關注升溫。台指方面，台指今日呈現開高走高格局，電子權值股漲勢延續，台積電突破2000元整數大關，隨著AMD與Meta合作消息發酵，今日資金集中在半導體、AI伺服器與相關供應鏈。終場成交量9819.67億元，創下史上最大量，加權指數上漲712.25點、漲幅2.05%、收在35413.07點。
綜合分析，台指日K拉出連七紅，多方攻勢強勁，偏多架構明確，然而短線漲幅驚人，投資人仍需留意高檔劇烈震盪。AI巨頭輝達(NVIDIA)最新財報預計台北時間明日公布，市場多認為可以繳出亮眼成績單，AI概念股成為盤面亮點。

news.Title: 想買台積電「等不到拉回」！ 夫妻不忍了：500萬閉眼All in
news.Content:
晶圓代工龍頭台積電（2330）股價持續飆升，25日正式站上2000元大關，寫下歷史新高，也帶動台股指數強勢上攻。市場情緒高漲，不僅投資人瘋搶，作家黃大米也掏腰包買10股做為紀念，更有民眾傳出砸500萬「閉眼All in」。
黃大米25日在 粉專 上發文，一早接獲友人傳來台積電突破2000元的截圖，直呼「真的超神奇」，認為股價一路連環上漲、幾乎沒有回檔，形容台積電不僅是台灣「護國神山」，更是許多股民的精神支柱與口袋救星。她也透露，為紀念這一歷史時刻，自己小額買進10股，約新台幣2萬元，笑稱「不是10張，是10股，我就是這麼奈米」。
貼文曝光後，引發網友熱烈討論。有留言指出，一對夫妻早已準備500萬元資金，原本打算等待股價回檔再進場，未料台積電一路上漲，始終等不到理想買點，最終決定「一早閉著眼睛All in」，顯示市場追價情緒升溫。
其他投資人也紛紛回應，「每天靠台積電吃飯的人很多」、「台股真的漲到無極限」、「超恐怖的買太少」、「因地緣政治的關係，股價被嚴重低估」、「不是錢太少，是買太少」等，甚至有人戲稱相關ETF也「跟著發瘋」，反映散戶對行情的高度參與與期待。
也有好心人提醒黃大米零股避免小於10股「零股要小心不要未滿10股，常常股票分割就減掉了。」但也有內行人回應「股票分割，是一拆多，比如一拆二的話，股價會變低，股數會變多，總價值不變。假使2000元的台積電一拆二，原本持有10股2000元台積電的人，會變成持有20股1000元的台積電，不會發生減掉的情況。」
從盤面表現來看，台積電當日開盤後即走強，先漲至1995元，隨後進一步攻上2000元關卡，帶動大盤大漲逾400點，指數突破3萬5000點整數關卡。主要權值股同步走揚，包括鴻海、聯發科、廣達與長榮等均呈現上漲態勢，顯示資金全面回流電子權值與大型股。
台積電股價創高不僅反映基本面強勁，也與市場對AI、先進製程需求持續看好有關。不過在股價快速上行之際，投資人也需留意追高風險，避免過度情緒化操作。整體而言，台積電站上2000元不僅具有象徵意義，更成為近期台股多頭氣勢的關鍵指標。
（封面圖／翻攝《台積電》官網）

news.Title: 《台股》開高走高、上漲712點，首度站上35K
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-02-25 15:53:50 新聞中心 發佈
美股四大指數、日經225指數全面走揚下，台股今(25)日在摩台、富台期結算及NVIDIA將公佈季報效應下，持續由台積電領軍、開高走高，加上權值股僅電器電纜、金融股略見拉回，且玻璃陶瓷、塑膠、油電燃氣強勢助攻，加權指數終場收在35413.07點，續改寫新高，上漲712.25點，漲幅2.05%，成交量增至9819.67億元。
超微(AMD)飆高、再加上軟體類股反彈，緩解AI恐顛覆部分產業商業模式的疑慮，美國四大指數24日全面收高。亞洲股市方面，跟隨美股腳步，日本軟體相關股彈升，半導體、AI相關股飆漲，加上日本首相傳出不樂見日本央行追加升息，以及日銀審議委員人事案讓市場對日銀早日升息的預期減退，激勵日經225指數收漲2.20%；韓國股市週三上漲1.91%，首度突破六千點大關，主要係晶片股持續上漲效應。
台積電今日衝上2000元大關、最高來到2025元，終場收在2015元，上漲2.54%，帶動電子族群普遍走高，鴻海漲逾6%，聯發科收在1870元，逼近高點1880元，同時AI股奇鋐、健策、緯穎、台光電、廣達等也都漲勢凌厲。
以29大類股來看，今日以玻璃陶瓷漲7.13%、塑膠漲6.38%以及油電燃氣漲5.89%表現最佳，其中台塑四寶表現強勢，台化、台塑亮燈漲停，且僅有電器電纜股跌逾1%、多數類股呈上漲格局。整體盤面則呈現傳產與中小型族群補漲格局，相對買盤也較為積極下，使今日整體量能明顯放大。
三大法人動向方面，今日三大法人總計買超425.52億元；其中，外資及陸資(不含外資自營商)買超413.01億元，投信買超50.81億元，自營商賣超38.3億元。

news.Title: 台積電封神！這美企霸氣買「逾1億顆美製晶片」 ASML驚人技術神助攻
news.Content:
蘋果於24日重磅宣布，2026年將向台積電亞利桑那州晶圓廠採購「遠超過 1 億顆」的先進晶片，規模較去年顯著跳升。此利多消息不僅激勵台積電ADR飆漲4.25%創下新高，更帶動台積電現貨今（25）日收盤強彈50元，以2015元刷新歷史天價，市值同步攀升至52.25兆元。
Mac mini、AI 伺服器進駐休士頓
蘋果在最新新聞稿中表示，將大幅擴建位於德州休士頓的工廠，未來「Mac mini」桌上型電腦將正式移回美國本土生產。除了終端產品，蘋果也計畫在該廠擴充先進 AI 伺服器產能，預計於今年晚些時候投產，並透過全新的「先進製造中心」提供專業實作培訓，預估將為休士頓創造數千個工作機會。
執行長庫克（Tim Cook）強調，蘋果正致力於深耕美國製造業的未來，對擴增休士頓產能感到自豪，這不僅是為了Mac mini，更是為了加速先進AI伺服器的布局。而支撐這項美國製造藍圖的核心，正是台積電亞利桑那州廠生產的先進晶片。
ASML 助攻2030年產量翻倍
除了蘋果大單挹注，半導體設備龍頭艾司摩爾（ASML）的研究進展也為台積電注入強心針。ASML研究團隊指出，已成功研發出提升關鍵晶片製造設備光源功率的新技術，預計在2030年前可讓晶片產量提升高達50%。
由於台積電的先進製程高度仰賴ASML的極紫外光（EUV）設備，業界普遍看好此項技術突破將有效降低生產成本，並進一步推升台積電未來的產出規模與獲利表現。
◎

news.Title: 神山再創高今未續列注意股 證交所：台積電絕不會被列處置股
news.Content:
台積電（2330）24日因「六個營業日起迄兩個營業日收盤價價差達185.00元且當日收盤價為最近六個營業日收盤價最高者」，被臺灣證券交易所25日列入注意股；據悉，台積電今（25）日雖再創高，收2,015元大漲50元，惟今天未持續遭證交所列注意股票。
此外，針對券商公會理事長陳俊宏今天說，台積電如果被進一步列入處置股、分盤交易的話，可能會導致成交量大幅下滑，且以台積電的量能來看，如果5分鐘或20分鐘一盤，對系統交易也是一個考驗，可能會有當機疑慮。
對此，證交所嚴予駁斥，並強調，台積電占台股權重已超過45％，股票要被列入處置股還要與同業及大盤表現，台積電本身就是權值股，具有一定指標地位，經與同業及大盤比較，不會有特別異常的價格波動，因此，「絕對不會被列處置股」。

news.Title: Amazon Just Delivered Great News for This Top AI Stock
news.Content:
Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) stock fell on its fourth-quarter earnings report as investors balked at its plans to spend $200 billion on capital expenditures, but there was some good news in the report as well.

One of the brightest spots for Amazon was the growth of its custom chips, Graviton and Trainium, which reached a run rate of more than $10 billion in annual revenue and is more than doubling on a year-over-year basis. If it was a stand-alone business, it might be worth $100 billion now.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

That's good news not just for Amazon, but also for Arm Holdings (NASDAQ: ARM) , which designs the CPUs used in Graviton. Arm sells a license to use the "instruction set" for the CPU and then collects a royalty when it is sold or put into use.

In addition to the rapid growth and the run rate above, Amazon CEO Andy Jassy noted that the company is "adding significant EC2 core computing capacity each day," referring to a core service of Amazon Web Services, its cloud infrastructure business , and that a majority of that is using Graviton.

Jassy also noted that Graviton's price performance is more than 40% per instance than comparable x86 processors, a competitor to Arm made by Intel and AMD .

The success of Graviton is clearly a win for Amazon, but it might be a bigger driver of Arm's growth as that company is bringing in a little more than $1 billion in revenue per quarter.

The better performance of Graviton over x86 alternatives is likely to encourage more spending on Arm CPUs for the cloud, and Arm management said its data center royalty revenue doubled in its most recent quarter. It believes that data center revenue could overtake smartphone revenue as its biggest category in the next three years.

In an interview with The Motley Fool, CFO Jason Child said that most Graviton CPUs now run on Arm and that the company would benefit from the growth of AI agents, which will demand more CPUs, driving up its royalty collections. Additionally, new versions of Graviton, like the Graviton 5, have more cores, meaning more CPUs. Newer chips are also using a more advanced Arm design, known as compute subsystems (CSS), which charges a significantly higher royalty rate.

As demand for Graviton and related cloud AI chips grows, Arm is well-positioned to benefit, making it an overlooked winner in the AI boom.
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon's custom chips, Graviton and Trainium, have achieved an annual revenue run rate exceeding $10 billion, doubling year-over-year.
• This growth is beneficial for Arm Holdings (ARM), which designs the CPUs utilized in Graviton chips.
• Graviton offers over 40% better price performance per instance compared to comparable x86 processors.
• Arm's data center royalty revenue doubled in the most recent quarter, with expectations that this segment will surpass smartphone revenue within three years.
news.Keywords: Amazon Custom Chips, Graviton CPUs, Arm Holdings Royalties, Data Center Revenue, AI Chip Market Growth

news.Title: 台股3萬5達陣！ 台經院孫明德：今年經濟成長率有望「7上8下」
news.Content:
台股今（25）日收盤以35413點作收，漲712點創下史上第八大，3萬5里程碑達到，台灣經濟研究院景氣預測中心主任孫明德表示，股市熱絡、消費動能回溫，全年經濟成長率由「坐4望5」，上修至「7上8下」。
台經院今發布最新景氣預測，受惠於AI需求持續成長，加上台美關稅協議達成，傳產信心回升，製造業營業氣候測驗點已呈現連續七個月的上揚。
孫明德說明，受惠於 AI（人工智慧）、高效能運算與雲端服務等應用需求持續強勁，加上去年同期適逢農曆春節、工作天數較少的低基期因素，2026年1月出口年增率由去年1月的 43.4% 大幅擴大至69.9%，就出口結構觀察，主要是資通與視聽產品、電子零組件受新興科技帶動。
服務業景氣也連續4個月呈現揚升態勢。1月服務業營業氣候測驗點來到 95.47點，較上月增加2.63點。孫明德指出，股市表現優異成為關鍵之一。
孫明德表示，儘管春節期間國際市場出現「川普關稅變數」，但台灣整體的出口表現依然維持暢旺動能。
展望今年景氣，孫明德指出，在股市熱絡帶動下，今年消費成長率有機會重返 2%以上。由於民間消費佔台灣經濟「半壁江山」，一旦消費動能回溫，將有助整體經濟表現。
孫明德指出，在出口動能延續，加上科技產業表現穩健與消費力道提升等因素助攻，整體經濟情勢有望優於原先預期，全年經濟成長率也由原本的「坐4望5」，上修至「7上8下」。

news.Title: 台股不是最強！韓國股市今年來漲44%稱霸 日股一年來飆2萬3千點
news.Content: 台股不是最強！加權指數今（25日）早站上3萬5千點大關，二天飆漲1600點令人咋舌，但今年來漲幅22%，在亞股中仍稱不上第一。亞洲鄰近國家中，韓國股市短短不到2個月史詩級飆漲44%，今年以來漲幅是台股將近一倍，而日股今早站上5萬8875點，近一年來飆2萬3千點漲幅亦高達49.38%，韓國一年漲125%，都超過台股水準，也難怪農曆春節之後，台股要「催足馬力」補漲急攻。

news.Title: 台股衝3萬5還能追？鉅亨買基金、安聯投信專家揭布局關鍵
news.Content:
台股本週開紅盤氣勢如虹，站上35,000新高點。指數頻創新高之際，不少投資人擔心「台股是不是太貴？現在還能進場嗎？」對此，鉅亨買基金與安聯投信一致認為，台股持續創高並非單靠題材推升，而是企業獲利實質成長所支撐。在AI長期趨勢未改變下，基本面仍具動能，台股依然看俏。若投資人難以判斷進場時點，「鉅亨買基金」建議，可透過自動化投資機制紀律布局，降低追高殺低的風險。
「鉅亨買基金」總經理張榮仁指出，台灣加權指數本質上是一個由科技業深度定義的市場，電子類股比重逼近七成，使其幾乎等同於「全球科技供應鏈指數」。也因此，當AI帶動全球科技需求持續攀升，台灣在供應鏈中的戰略地位只會更加凸顯。出口動能的擴張，不僅支撐企業營收成長，更強化台股長線基本面更具韌性。
進一步從數據觀察，AI紅利已實質反映在貿易結構上。2025年12月，美國自台灣進口金額達241億美元，超越自中國進口的201億美元，且已連續兩個月高於中國。張榮仁分析，資訊與通訊產品，以及電器與電子設備零組件表現最為亮眼，顯示在全球供應鏈重組與地緣政治變化之下，台灣相關產業具備顯著優勢，成為國際資本重新配置的重要受惠者。
然而，市場對AI產業的討論始終伴隨雜音。自2023年生成式AI問世以來，幾乎每隔3至6個月就會出現一次「AI泡沫論」。安聯台灣科技基金經理人周敬烈指出，大型語言模型市場具高度「贏者全拿」特性，業者若在算力投資上保守，市占率可能迅速被超越，因此反而促使企業加速資本支出。這種競逐態勢，使AI投資動能具有延續性，而非短期題材炒作。
針對市場擔心台股、尤其是科技股「漲多、估值偏高」的疑慮，周敬烈進一步表示，目前多數科技股走的是「獲利驅動」行情，而非單純評價擴張。也就是說，股價上漲反映的是企業獲利預期持續上修，而非市場過度透支未來。當基本面成長能見度提高，評價自然獲得支撐。
儘管如此，高科技權重也意味著波動相對明顯。張榮仁認為，波動本身未必是風險，關鍵在於投資人如何應對。市場修正時，情緒往往放大恐慌，導致人性出現「追高殺低」的行為偏誤；但若能透過自動化機制紀律執行，反而能將震盪轉化為機會。「鉅亨超底王」正是透過兩段式加碼設計，在市場急跌時自動增加投入，避免投資人因恐懼而錯失低點。
根據「鉅亨買基金」回測過去三十年資料，若採用「超底王」的兩段式加碼策略，累積報酬約755%，明顯優於固定投入定期定額約549%，差距超過200個百分點，顯示在高波動、長期向上的市場中，紀律化加碼更具優勢。

news.Title: 【Follow法人】台積電創高！外資大舉出脫0050 買超牛皮股鴻海逾6.8萬張
news.Content:
（下午5時1分更新外資買賣超個股）
台股今（25）日終場收在終場收在35,413.07點，上漲712.25點。三大法人買超425.53億元，外資續挺台股，買超413億元，馬年3天以來共計撒幣1123.87億元。今日主要買超標的包括塑化族群、高息ETF，並掃貨群創（3481）7萬張登冠，另同步加碼鴻海6.8萬張。

news.Title: 【Follow法人】續挺台股！外資買超413億元 馬年3天已撒幣逾千億元
news.Content: 台股今（25）日終場收在終場收在35,413.07點，上漲712.25點。三大法人買超425.53億元，其中外資續挺台股，買超413億元，馬年3天以來共計撒幣1123.87億元。

news.Title: 川普關稅重啟？台股領漲8.71%  新興市場潛力曝光
news.Content:
財經中心／王駿凱 報導
二月份全球市場經歷了AI顛覆性影響與關稅不確定性衝擊，儘管美股因科技股修正回落，公用事業和基礎建設股的輪動輪到，臺灣、日本以及新興市場表現亮眼。此外，美伊地緣衝突的升級推高了黃金與天然資源的表現。
富蘭克林證券投顧指出，對於二月的投資環境，需關注川普關稅政策、伊朗局勢及輝達財報的影響。美國最高法院的裁決未結束關稅爭端，但一定程度限制了新關稅的擴張，有助於穩定全球經濟。在此背景下，風險資產仍可繼續看好多頭行情。
富蘭克林證券投顧建議，目前可關注美國及新興市場的股票和債券機會，並以美國平衡型基金及非投資等級債券型基金為投資核心。對於股票方面，科技及創新科技基金在AI商機中有良好的參與潛力。透過新興市場平衡型基金，可以把握股市、債市及匯率的機會。
在主要區域的股票型基金中，台股因半導體需求強勁而上漲8.71%，表現最為突出；日本股票型基金上漲6.13%，新興市場股票型基金也受益於商品價格上升，漲幅達4.54%。然而，美國股票型基金因科技股修正而下跌2.06%。
國內核備之主要債券型基金表現(圖/富蘭克林證券投顧提供)
富蘭克林坦伯頓日本基金經理人邱正松強調，隨著日本執政聯盟的壓倒性勝利，長期政權穩定有助於降低政策不確定性，預期對於財政擴張及經濟安全的投資也將提升企業獲利能見度。日本在經歷30年通縮後，正逐步邁入通膨環境，並顯示出成長、薪資及物價上升的迴圈。在產業型基金中，黃金貴金屬基金上漲9.95%，顯示市場對於避險需求的持續。另外，公用事業和基礎建設產業型基金也分別上漲8.56%與7.51%。而科技產業型基金則因持續的AI疑慮而下跌3.48%。富蘭克林坦伯頓新興國家固定收益基金經理人麥可．哈森泰博指出，隨著一些新興國的政策改革提升基本面，全球區域化趨勢和產業迴流也將使部分國家受益，進一步增添漲勢。
《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。
原文出處： 川普關稅重啟？台股領漲8.71% 新興市場潛力曝光

news.Title: 股民助長台股發威  證交所1月稅後淨利激增93.91%破250億元
news.Content:
財經中心／王駿凱 報導
1月份全體證券商稅後淨利達252.35億元，較前一月份成長122.21億元，增幅接近93.91%。
在交易活躍的背景下，大盤總成交值約為16.635兆元，與上個月相比成長了56.21%。這一增長不僅提升了證券經紀業務的手續費收入，也促進了證券商的整體業務發展。由於交易量的增加，證券商的經紀手續費收入有明顯的提升，這反映了投資者的交易意願強勁，市場活躍度高。
此外，1月份自營業務方面表現突出，證券商的出售證券利益及證券評價利益顯著上升，使得自營業務淨利較上月成長了79.74億元，增幅驚人的186.74%。這顯示出證券商在資本運用上的成功，能夠有效把握市場機會，為收益增長貢獻了力量。
承銷業務方面，1月份的淨利較上月也成長了5.46億元，增幅達到28.65%。這意味著證券商在新股發行和資本運作方面持續獲得成功，進一步鞏固了其在市場中的地位。
此現象突顯出證券市場在年初階段的樂觀趨勢，專家對於後續市場表現持正面態度，預期隨著經濟復甦與投資者信心的回升，證券商未來的利潤增長仍然值得期待。
《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。
原文出處： 股民助長台股發威 證交所1月稅後淨利激增93.91%破250億元

news.Title: 《科技》愛立信MWC2026秀AI＋6G應用 攜聯發科、蘋果擴大布局
news.Content:
【時報記者王逸芯台北報導】2026世界行動通訊大會（Mobile World Congress,MWC2026）將於3月2日至5日在西班牙巴塞隆納盛大登場。愛立信將攜手多家產業夥伴於MWC期間展示前瞻通訊應用情境，並聯合蘋果與聯發科（2454）等關鍵晶片與終端大廠，深化次世代行動通訊布局，聚焦5G演進與6G技術發展，展現生態系整合實力與未來網路創新方向。
隨著6G預計於2030年進入商用，愛立信與設備和晶片製造商如蘋果和聯發科展開策略合作，加強建構6G生態系統。在本次MWC中，將展示5G和6G頻譜共享預標準，以及6G原型系統的最新進展，包含與聯發科共同展示於6G原型系統厘米波（centimeter-wave）頻段上的數據傳輸。除了驗證6G技術的可行性，更為AI增強擴增實境（AI-enhanced XR）等次世代前瞻應用，奠定邁向6G商用化的堅實基礎。
台灣愛立信雲端軟體與服務事業群客戶策略協理魏逸國表示：「愛立信與聯發科和蘋果公司合作，共同開發、驗證和展示關鍵的6G功能，象徵著6G生態系的關鍵進程。我們將與合作夥伴一同致力於3GPP標準下，打造具備擴展性與開放性的新一代行動網路，以滿足AI應用對效能的嚴苛要求。藉由技術概念、互通性驗證與關鍵功能推進，愛立信持續串聯台灣與全球夥伴，為電信商邁向6G奠定基石，並為未來的AI驅動型創新服務開啟新的機會。」
愛立信也將與微軟（Microsoft）合作，展示將企業級5G筆電管理導入Windows11平台，打造隨時連線、安全且易於遠端部署與管理的PC體驗。透過Ericsson Enterprise 5G Connect整合微軟AI驅動的連線智慧技術，進一步提升效能、安全性與使用者體驗。目前已有七家領先電信商投入此項合作的早期導入計畫，預計於2026年第二季起陸續擴大商用。
除了各種AI應用情境，愛立信亦將展示與遠傳電信及OPPO合作的應用實踐案例。三方於5G SA獨立組網架構下，成功在2025年底台北大巨蛋萬人演唱會現場，驗證結合AI與網路切片的智慧差異化連接服務；並首創透過手機端裝置的「AI即時偵測」功能，在用戶流量需求提升時，可一鍵啟動「應用程式級網路切片（App-level slicing）」，即時優化高話務密集場域的網路體驗。

news.Title: 《台北股市》外資大派紅包！狂掃413億元今年第四大 連6買不手軟
news.Content:
【時報-台北電】美股收高為台股注入強勁「牛」氣。周三台積電（2330）收高在2015元，千元高價股盤中一度來到37檔，嘉澤（3533）、印能科技（7734）、雙鴻（3324）、竑騰（7751）及華城（1519）等封住漲停收盤。
權值股強勢，鴻海（2317）大漲6%，台達電（2308）法說會前夕衝上1480元新天價。惟記憶體與玻纖布族群分化，南亞科（2408）、旺宏（2337）、富喬（1815）等有壓。終場台股漲712.25點，為35413.07點。
今日外資(不含外資自營商)買超413.0179億元，為今年第四大買超；投信買超50.8149億元，自營商賣超38.3038億元，三大法人買超425.52億元。自營商先退場，外資持續買進，累計連6買達2452億元，累計2月份買超金額達1366億元。
資金面持續火熱，昨日外資創下史上第四大買超紀錄，單日加碼627億元，推動台股單日飆漲927點，創下歷史第二大漲幅。牛市氣勢延續，今日大盤指數直接挑戰35K大關。然而，跨越農曆春節前後的連六漲，波段累計漲幅已逾3000點，融資餘額亦大增53億元至3775億元，八大公股大舉提款換銀彈188億元，創下歷史新高，籌碼凌亂與漲幅過大成為市場隱憂。
技術面觀察，本周台股快速突破34K與35K二大關卡，搭配KD、MACD等指標同步走強，中多格局仍具延續性，三大法人偏多操作亦提供支撐。然而，根據歷史經驗，元宵節後變盤機率偏高，加上本波段累計漲幅過大，與季線乖離率擴增至15.4%，市場已累積過熱修正壓力，短線震盪可能加劇。
富邦投顧副總陶治瑋指出，整體而言台股仍偏多格局，但短線須留意漲多過熱風險，尤其輝達財報將公布，將牽動市場對AI產業前景的信心。操作上建議避免追高，可選擇具業績支撐或展會題材加持的個股，採取短線多方操作策略。（編輯：張嘉倚）

news.Title: 台積列"'注意股" 盤中2020元市值2兆美元登世界第6
news.Content:
財經中心／陳妍霖 林大帷 台北報導
新春開工以來，台股漲翻天，今天繼續衝衝衝，權值王台積電完全不甩被證交所列入注意股，照樣漲到沒極限，首度衝破2000元大關，盤中一度來到2020元，大漲55元，寫下歷史紀錄，市值衝破2兆美元，世界排名第六，鴻海、聯發科、台達電漲勢強勁，也讓大盤指數一度大漲超過800點，衝破35500點，刷新紀錄。
沒有最高，只有更高，權值王台積電萬馬奔騰，股價繼續狂噴，盤中直衝2020元，刷新紀錄，市值衝破2兆美元，世界排名第六，鴻海、聯發科、台達電、廣達也一片紅通通，領軍大盤指數，盤中一度大漲811點，最高一度來到35512點，漲幅2.34%，刷新紀錄。
台積列"'注意股" 盤中2020元市值2兆美元登世界第6（圖／民視財經網）
資深分析師陳建誠指出，「其實一開盤的時候，大家的追價意願不高，可是看到台積電整個2000站上去之後，我想許多股民也許整個這個信心就大增，熱血沸騰，所以反而現在的預估量在逐漸增加，那目前大概是在1兆左右，這一兩天，真的是一直在創新高的個股，我覺得投資人你在這個時候追高真的要留意」。
電子族群漲翻天，帶旺台股，不過台積電因為這幾天漲勢過度猛烈，罕見被證交所列入''注意股''，也讓股民擔心，接下來會不會關禁閉？
台積列"'注意股" 盤中2020元市值2兆美元登世界第6（圖／民視財經網）
資深分析師陳建誠分析說，「通常會被列入注意股，都是代表這一支股票的行情是非常的熱絡，過熱不代表它就會冷卻，就是過熱它可能還會持續過熱，魏總裁他其實就一直心裡有個目標價，就是會到2000，其實在1月法說會前，高盛也早就預估，台積電的目標價會到2330，就是跟他的股價代號一樣，那現在看起來離2330也越來越近了」。
分析師認為，台積電基本面強勁，股價有機會再往上攻，不過還是得提醒投資人，謹慎操作，小心風險。
《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。
原文出處： 台積列「注意股」沒在怕！盤中2020元市值2兆美元登世界第6

news.Title: 【盤後焦點】台積電寫2025元天價　台股漲712點價量同創新高
news.Content:
（中央社記者江明晏台北2026年2月25日電）台股今天開高走高，由台積電領軍AI族群強漲，傳產股由塑化及重電族群上攻，盤中指數大漲逾820點，創35521點新高；終場上漲712.25點，收在35413.07點，連5天改寫新高紀錄，今天成交值9819.67億元同創歷史新高。台積電盤中攀至2025元，終場漲50元，收在2015元，續寫天價。
市場再度關注人工智慧（AI）熱潮帶來的潛在利多，美股今天收漲，費城半導體指數上漲1.45%，台積電ADR漲4.25%，帶動台股今天開高走高。
台股今天以34753.31點開高，盤中指數大漲逾820點，登上35521.54點，續創歷史指數新高點。
台股加權指數終場上漲712.25點，收在35413.07點，漲幅2.05%，成交金額新台幣9819.67億元，價量同創歷史新高。電子股指數今天上漲2.45%，續創新高；金融股指數下跌0.63%。櫃買指數今天震盪拉尾盤，終場上漲0.58%，指數以313.24點創下收盤歷史新高。
觀察權值股表現，台積電盤中上漲60元，續寫2025元盤中新天價；終場上漲50元，收在2015元，漲幅2.54%。鴻海大漲6.25%，收在246.5元；台達電漲3.61%以1435元再創新高，聯發科漲2.47%、收在1870元。
AI伺服器族群雀躍，廣達、緯創、緯穎股價強漲約5%；散熱族群如健策、奇鋐漲逾6%，雙鴻強勢漲停。
記憶體族群今天熄火，華邦電、南亞科、旺宏、群聯收黑；PCB族群強勢，景碩、欣興震盪收紅、南電攻上漲停；尖點、台光電勁揚，聯茂漲停；坐擁低軌衛星題材的華通熄火，下挫7.1%。
觀察高價股走勢，股王信驊盤中震盪，收跌0.41%；精測、穎崴、川湖、健策、富世達、智邦等強漲；華城、漢唐大漲登上千金股，台股躍升達「36千金股」。
兆豐國際投顧副總經理黃國偉表示，台股封關前融資大幅縮減，籌碼面趨於沉澱，在長假期間已消化利空因素，原先市場憂心的美伊衝突、關稅等變數，如今陰霾已逐步散去；加上基本面表現強勁，帶動指數續攻。近期融資明顯回補，短短2個交易日增加約新台幣100億元，推升股價進一步走高。
他指出，在台積電領軍之下，整體基本面確實亮眼，1月營收與出口接單數據表現突出，為多頭增添底氣。
不過，他提醒，指數短短數日已大漲近2000點，市場須以「居高思維」審慎看待後市走勢，留意是否出現獲利了結賣壓，未來兩個交易日將是重要觀察期，「漲多就是最大利空」。此外，後續還需關注輝達財報表現，內容預期仍偏正向，但財報公布後股價的反應強弱，將是影響市場情緒的關鍵指標。（編輯：張良知）

news.Title: 台股成交值頻破兆　券商公會籲政府研議合理證交稅率
news.Content:
（中央社記者曾仁凱台北2026年02月25日電）台股連日創新高，上市櫃單日成交值頻破兆元，券商公會呼籲政府研議建立合理的證交稅率，尤其「公司債、金融債及債券ETF證交稅停徵」與「當沖稅率減半」將分別於今年底和明年底屆期，建請政府及早啟動證交稅條例修法程序，確保無縫接軌，維持市場穩定運作。
券商公會今天舉行媒體春酒，券商公會理事長暨元富證券董事長陳俊宏表示，去年台灣證券市場在基本面、資金面、政策面3面向俱到的優勢條件下，交出亮麗成績單，包括台股指數收在28963點、上市櫃日均成交值新台幣5309億元、上市櫃公司市值達百兆元，居全球前8大交易市場。
展望今年，陳俊宏表示，券商公會將致力於完備證券市場制度，全力發展證券商多元服務，已規劃8項工作重點，包括籲請政府研議建立合理證交稅率、協調證券業者組成「結構型或理財商品」工作模組、強化權證市場發展、積極推動分戶帳業務並鬆綁負債淨值倍數相關規定、完備投資人買賣海外有價證券服務功能、持續提升證券商數位服務品質並強化資安韌性、持續辦理防範金融詐騙宣導活動，以及精進教育訓練品質。
其中，陳俊宏表示，台股證交稅率千分之3，在亞洲股市偏高，建請政府通盤研究建構合理證交稅率。他表示，包括公司債、金融債及債券ETF證交稅停徵，以及當沖稅率減半，實證結果成功帶動證券市場交易流動性、吸引優質企業在台掛牌籌資發展經濟，並增加證交稅收，形成多贏局面；但相關降稅措施都有實施期限。
陳俊宏表示，公司債、金融債及債券ETF證交稅停徵將於今年底屆期，當沖稅率減半也將於明年底屆期，為避免屆期前的不確定性，影響投資人投資決策判斷，建請政府及早啟動證交稅條例修法程序，確保無縫接軌，維持市場穩定運作。

news.Title: If You Like Money, This ETF Could Be What You're Looking For
news.Content:
Whether you're an experienced investor or just getting started, your first goal is to protect your money as it grows. One way to do that is by investing in an exchange-traded fund (ETF). An ETF is a type of investment fund that holds a collection of assets, including stocks, bonds, and commodities. By holding a variety of assets, an ETF diversifies your portfolio and helps spread risk when the market is down.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Not all ETFs are created equal, and frankly, some are better than others. Vanguard Total Stock Market (NYSEMKT: VTI) meets the criteria for an ideal fund. Among the characteristics identifying a strong ETF are a clear investment approach, low costs, and strong historical performance. Here's how VTI stacks up in those areas:

The VTI ETF uses a clear and straightforward investment approach. It tracks the CRSP US Total Market Index, which weights all investable U.S. stocks by market cap. It's no surprise that corporate powerhouses like Apple , Microsoft , Amazon , Alphabet , Nvidia , Tesla , Meta Platforms , and Berkshire Hathaway rise to the top.

As those big-name corporations increase in value, so do VTI and your diversified portfolio.

VTI -- like all Vanguard ETFs -- is famous for its low expense ratio. Unlike with an employer-sponsored retirement plan, you don't have to dig for how much you're paying in fees. It's 0.06%, or just $6 annually for an investment of $10,000.

If you're curious about how Vanguard gets away with charging so little in fees, here are three reasons:

Unique ownership setup: Vanguard is owned by its funds, and those funds are owned by investors. This means there's no pressure to maximize profits to please outside shareholders.

Pure numbers: The company has so many assets under management that it can pass on discounted expense ratios to investors.

Low marketing fees: Vanguard rarely uses an external sales or marketing force. Instead, it depends on word of mouth to attract new investors.

Despite the financial crisis of 2007 to 2009, a global pandemic, and various geopolitical events, VTI has managed to end most years on a high note. Here's a breakdown of the fund's performance since 2015:

If nothing else, despite all that has happened over the past decade, this table indicates how well VTI has handled financial turbulence.
news.AI_Summary:
• Vanguard Total Stock Market ETF (VTI) tracks the CRSP US Total Market Index, weighting all investable U.S. stocks by market cap.
• Top holdings include Apple, Microsoft, Amazon, Alphabet, Nvidia, Tesla, Meta Platforms, and Berkshire Hathaway.
• VTI has a low expense ratio of 0.06% and has demonstrated strong historical performance, handling market turbulence well.
• The ETF offers diversification across the U.S. stock market, providing exposure to major corporate powerhouses.
news.Keywords: Vanguard Total Stock Market ETF, VTI ETF, Market Cap Weighting, Diversification, Low Expense Ratio, Historical Performance

news.Title: 《盤後解析》馬年3天飆漲1807點 黃文清：短盯外資、中期線還在半山腰
news.Content:
【時報記者葉時安台北報導】周二美股四大指數全面收高，周三台股開漲52.49點報34753.31點，電子、傳產走勢強勁，雖然金融走疲、記憶體轉跌，但由中鋼(2002)、台玻(1802)、台塑(1301)、台積電(2330)領軍，台股、台積電盤中衝上35521.54點、2025元，分別上漲60元或3.05%、820.72點或2.36%，雙雙改寫新紀錄，齊爆量以35413.07點、2015元作收，盤中、收盤均寫新高度，台股量能9819.67億元同寫新猷，量價雙高峰。馬年三天台股累積大漲1807.36點或5.38%。
周三終場，加權指數上漲712.25點或2.05%，報35413.07點，成交量升至9819.67億元，量、價雙雙改寫新高；櫃檯指數上漲1.80點或0.58%，報313.24點，成交量增至2129.1億元。
台新投顧副總經理黃文清表示，市場看好輝達財報，以及AI後續動能，外資大量回補台股，推升台股指數頻頻創高，買氣驚人，行情持續有勁，短期留意外資買超力道多寡，短線高檔不設限。而AI趨勢並未改變，故現階段評估中長期走勢，預估台股指數目前僅在半山腰，上半年36000關卡可期，甚至會更高。
不過市場擔憂短線過熱使得操作不易？黃副總認為，AMD奪Meta五年AI晶片大單，拉升周三相關概念股走勢，輝達財報也即將出爐，後續AI動能可期，可望催熱多頭發展，操作上，AI為主軸，而記憶體轉弱，評估為類股輪動，如今資金流動快速，漲價題材如記憶體、被動元件等，以及PCB、散熱、機殼等輪動上漲態勢。
至於市場擔憂川普對等關稅，黃副總提到，即使川普新關稅，但台美協議框架確立，有協議支撐對雙方貿易前景態勢不俗，然三月關稅送至立法院審議將是觀察重點，若通過後將迎來正面利多。
指數貢獻度前五大個股，權值王台積電(2330)拉抬412.24點最威，鴻海(2317)以66.70點居次，隨後依據為台達電(2308)、聯發科(2454)、廣達(2382)。然拉低指數個股前七大，南亞科(2408)拉低指數9.28點，以及聯電(2303)、國泰金(2882)、華通(2313)、華邦電(2344)、富邦金(2881)、旺宏(2337)，七大就有三檔記憶體製造廠入列，金融雙雄同樣入榜。

news.Title: Why I'm Not Buying Nvidia Stock
news.Content:
Shares of Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) head into one of the market's biggest events of the quarter when the AI chip leader reports fourth-quarter and full-year fiscal 2026 results after market close on Wednesday, Feb. 25. Given the company's incredible $4.7 trillion market capitalization as of this writing, you can bet that many investors will be watching -- and the news from the company may be enough to move both its own stock and the broader indexes.

Nvidia's underlying business performance recently has been nothing short of astounding, with the most recent quarter showing revenue growth accelerating again -- on top of already extremely high growth rates. The harder part, however, is the stock. At today's price, the market expects near perfection from the AI (artificial intelligence) chipmaker.

Where to invest $1,000 right now? Our analyst team just revealed what they believe are the 10 best stocks to buy right now, when you join Stock Advisor. See the stocks »

Here's a closer look at why I'm staying on the sidelines going into Nvidia's earnings update this week.

Nvidia's fiscal third-quarter update (ended Oct. 26, 2025) showed why investors remain upbeat about AI infrastructure spending. Revenue in the period rose 62% year over year to $57.0 billion -- an acceleration from 56% growth in fiscal Q2.

That strength is still centered in the data center segment. Nvidia's data center revenue rose 66% year over year to $51.2 billion in fiscal Q3 -- up from $41.1 billion in fiscal Q2.

Profitability has held up well, too, even as the business scales rapidly. Nvidia's GAAP gross margin was 73.4% in fiscal Q3, up sequentially but down from 74.6% a year earlier.

Orders for Nvidia's products have been surreal.

"Demand for AI infrastructure continues to exceed our expectations," said Nvidia chief financial officer Colette Kress in the company's fiscal third-quarter earnings call. "The clouds are sold out, and our GPU installed base, both new and previous generations, including Blackwell, Hopper, and Ampere, is fully utilized."

Looking ahead, Nvidia guided for fiscal Q4 revenue of about $65.0 billion, plus or minus 2%. Against revenue of $39.3 billion in fiscal Q4 of last year, the midpoint implies about 65.4% year-over-year growth.

The problem for me is that the stock price already prices in a long runway of elevated growth rates. Highlighting its premium valuation, Nvidia currently trades at roughly 48 times earnings.

While Nvidia's current growth profile does a good job of justifying a valuation multiple like this, there's valuation risk if growth rates decline or if Nvidia's pricing power erodes over time. And given the fast-changing, cyclical nature of the semiconductor industry, I prefer to wait for a significant margin of safety before buying a stock. Specifically, for a tech stock like Nvidia, I want to be able to forecast a scenario in which the stock could earn a 15% annual return over the long haul from its current price before buying. At Nvidia's current valuation, I just can't make that math work.

In short, I don't believe there is enough margin of safety for me to personally buy the stock today. From its current valuation, Nvidia can keep growing and still deliver only ordinary returns if the valuation multiple compresses as growth normalizes.

But for investors who believe we are in the early innings of the AI boom and that Nvidia's competitive advantages can endure for the long haul, it may make sense to start a small position in the stock. Sizing, however, is key. Given Nvidia stock's valuation risk, it could be a bumpy ride.

I can like the business and still pass on the stock. And that's exactly what I'm doing -- at least for now. Unless the post-earnings move falls significantly, I'll likely continue staying on the sidelines, deploying my capital elsewhere.

To be clear: This isn't a prediction that the stock will move lower following Nvidia's earnings report. I have no idea what the stock will do. Regardless of what it does, I feel like I need a better price relative to the fundamentals, so there's no reason for me to buy now and hope the stock goes up when the company reports earnings.
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's Q4 FY2026 revenue was $57.0 billion (up 62% YoY), an acceleration from 56% growth in Q3.
• Data center revenue rose 66% YoY to $51.2 billion in fiscal Q3.
• Nvidia's GAAP gross margin was 73.4% in fiscal Q3, slightly down from 74.6% a year earlier.
• The stock trades at roughly 48 times earnings, with valuation risk if growth rates decline or pricing power erodes.
news.Keywords: Nvidia Q4 Earnings, Revenue Growth Acceleration, Data Center Revenue, Gross Margin, Valuation Risk, AI Chip Market

news.Title: 〈台股盤後〉策馬狂奔連5日創新高 爆天量9820億元漲712點收35413點
news.Content:
台積電今 (25) 日衝上 2025 元，帶動大盤一度大漲超過 800 點，最高漲至 35521.54 點，終場漲 712.25 點或 2.05%，創台股史上第 8 大漲點，以 35413.07 點作收，再度創歷史收盤新高，爆出成交天量 9820 億元，總市值約 115.42 兆元。台股連續 6 個交易日走揚，累積大漲 3630.15 點。
台股 2026 年開年以來，在台積電大漲 30% 的帶動下，大盤指數漲幅超過 22%，繼元月大漲 3100 點後，2 月以來漲點達到 3349 點；馬年開春三個交易日累計狂漲 1807.36 點，在熱錢簇擁下，連續 5 個交易日天天創新高，今天更爆出史上近兆元的最大量
台積電 (2330-TW) 盤中漲至 2025 元，再度創歷史新天價，終場漲 50 元或 2.54%，以 2015 原作收。其他電子權值股同樣多頭氣盛，鴻海 (2317-TW) 漲勢凌厲，大漲逾半根停板，廣達 (2382-TW) 漲逾 4%，台達電 (2308-TW) 漲逾 3%，聯發科 (2454-TW) 漲逾 2%，日月光 (3711-TW) 則漲逾 1%。
近日股價相對疲軟的 AI 族群今天回神走揚，電子五哥在廣達領軍下，緯創 (3231-TW)、緯穎 (6669-TW) 雙雙漲逾半根停板，英業達 (2356-TW) 漲逾 3%，和碩 (4938-TW)、仁寶 (2324-TW) 漲逾 1%。
機殼與散熱族群也紛紛上揚，機殼族群方面，營邦 (3693-TW) 漲停鎖死 413 元，AMAX-KY(6933-TW) 漲逾半根停板，勤誠 (8210-TW) 漲逾 4%，晟銘電 (3013-TW) 漲逾 1%；散熱族群部分，尼得科超眾 (6230-TW)、雙鴻 (3324-TW) 亮燈漲停，奇鋐 (3017-TW)、健策 (3653-TW) 漲逾半根停板，建準 (2421-TW) 漲逾 4%。
台電近日釋出 94 億元設備採購大單，重電四雄雨露均霑今天皆收紅，華城 (1519-TW) 漲停鎖死 1050 元，亞力 (1514-TW) 漲逾 4%，士電 (1503-TW) 及中興電 (1513-TW) 皆有超過 1% 漲幅。
ABF 載板三雄今天續強，南電 (8046-TW) 漲停鎖死 553 元，欣興 (3037-TW) 漲逾 2%，景碩 (3189-TW) 則漲逾 1%。其他 PCB 相關族群則漲跌互現，聯茂 (6213-TW) 漲停鎖死 146.5 元，尖點 (8021-TW)、台玻 (1802-TW) 漲逾半根停板；華通 (2313-TW) 跌逾半根停板，燿華 (2367-TW) 跌逾 4%。

news.Title: Solid Power Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
news.Content:
5 EV Battery and Lithium Stocks Charging the Future

Solid Power (NASDAQ:SLDP) used its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings call to outline progress on its electrolyte sampling strategy, development roadmap, and partner programs, while emphasizing continued financial discipline as it works toward commercialization of its solid-state battery technology.

President and CEO John Van Scoter said 2025 was “an important year of execution” against a set of near-term objectives that included advancing electrolyte innovation, ramping sampling activity, executing agreements with SK On, and maintaining disciplined capital spending.

→ Hinge Health’s AI Moat Might Be Its Patient Movement Data

On sampling, Van Scoter said the company continued providing multiple generations of its electrolyte material to both existing and new customers. He highlighted an October 2025 Joint Evaluation Agreement with Samsung SDI and BMW to advance all-solid-state battery development, calling it validation of Solid Power’s electrolyte sampling efforts. Following the announcement, Solid Power began executing under the agreement and providing electrolyte to Samsung SDI for joint evaluation activities.

Van Scoter also pointed to BMW’s May 2025 demonstration of solid-state battery technology in a BMW i7 test vehicle, describing it as a meaningful achievement in the partnership and noting Solid Power’s role in the effort.

→ Gold and Silver Pulled Back—Here’s Why the Bull Case Is Intact

Solid Power said it made progress toward installation of a continuous electrolyte production pilot line. In 2025, the company completed ordering long-lead equipment and conducted detailed design work for the line. Management expects to install and commission the continuous pilot line by the end of 2026.

Van Scoter described the continuous pilot line as intended to support small-volume customer programs and to help Solid Power “learn and optimize” manufacturing processes ahead of full commercialization. In prepared remarks, he added that the line is designed to expand annual electrolyte production capacity to up to 75 metric tons.

→ Opendoor Pops After Earnings, But the Big Question Hasn’t Changed

Looking further out, Solid Power said it plans in 2026 to pursue a potential partnership for commercial-scale electrolyte production in Korea. Van Scoter said the company intends to evaluate partners with process capabilities and capital to support construction of a facility capable of producing up to 500 metric tons of electrolyte annually, with Solid Power contributing technical expertise, intellectual property, and process knowledge.

Van Scoter said Solid Power continued executing under its agreements with SK On, including a research and development license, a line installation agreement, and an electrolyte supply agreement. The agreements are intended to enable SK On to develop solid-state cells based on Solid Power’s technology and operate a pilot cell manufacturing line using Solid Power’s electrolyte.

During 2025, Solid Power completed factory acceptance testing and was nearing completion of site acceptance testing at SK On’s facility. For 2026, management said it expects to complete site acceptance testing in the first quarter and then work with SK On on line validation activities. After site acceptance testing, Solid Power plans to begin delivering electrolyte to SK On to support validation efforts.

In the Q&A, CFO Linda Heller clarified that the line is installed at SK On’s facility in Korea and that SK On will largely run it independently once site acceptance testing is completed, with Solid Power providing support. She added that any additional capital improvements for that line would be SK On’s responsibility, though Solid Power would consider ways to assist if opportunities arise, citing the strength of its balance sheet.

During Q&A, management provided color on cycle times for electrolyte production. Van Scoter said the company runs a variety of batch sizes that directly affect cycle times. At Solid Power’s Electrolyte Innovation Center, it can produce batches of 2 kilograms or less—depending on customer requests—with turnaround “in days.” At larger batch sizes, typically 40 to 50 kilograms at its current SP2 batch facility, cycle times run approximately one week, depending on batch size and specific process parameters being controlled.

Asked about diversification of cell form factors, Van Scoter said Solid Power has not yet seen significant diversification across engagements. He said the company could envision prismatic formats or others as newer segments beyond electric vehicles consider all-solid-state batteries, but added that current engagement is “primarily pouch” format and “primarily EV customers.”

CFO Linda Heller reported 2025 revenue of $21.7 million, up $1.6 million from 2024. She attributed the increase primarily to work performed under the line installation agreement with SK On.

Operating expenses were $122.6 million in 2025 versus $125.5 million in 2024. Heller said the decrease reflected cost discipline, partially offset by investments in research and development and by equipment purchases and services related to SK On agreements. Operating loss for 2025 was $100.8 million, and net loss was $93.4 million, or $0.51 per share.

Capital expenditures were $10.2 million in 2025, primarily related to planned construction of the continuous electrolyte production pilot line. Cash investment—defined by the company as cash used in operations plus capital expenditures—totaled $84.5 million for 2025, which management said was at the lower end of revised guidance.

Solid Power ended 2025 with total liquidity of $336.5 million as of December 31, 2025, up $9 million from year-end 2024. Contract assets and accounts receivable were $9.6 million, and total current liabilities were $16.8 million. During the fourth quarter, the company raised $56 million in net proceeds through its at-the-market program, bringing total 2025 net proceeds from the ATM to $88.8 million.

For 2026, Heller guided to cash investment of $85 million to $100 million, reflecting continued investment in advancing the electrolyte development roadmap, including commissioning the continuous pilot line, while preserving liquidity.

Management also discussed capital-raising activity. Van Scoter said the company completed a $130 million registered direct offering “last month,” which he said strengthened liquidity and enhanced strategic flexibility. In Q&A, Heller said the company believes it is “well positioned” to support partners based on its liquidity and the proceeds from the offering, while continuing to monitor runway.

In discussing industry timelines, Van Scoter referenced SK On’s public comments at a pilot facility ribbon-cutting event, stating SK On had said it wanted start of production for its batteries in 2029, which he characterized as a one-year pull-in from prior statements. He said he would expect 2027 to be a strong cell development year, with 2028 “more mature” leading into a 2029 start of production, while noting SK On should speak to details.

Solid Power, Inc (NASDAQ: SLDP) is a Colorado-based company specializing in the development and manufacturing of all-solid-state rechargeable battery cells for the electric vehicle (EV) and aerospace industries. Founded in 2012 as a spin-out from the University of Colorado Boulder, Solid Power has focused on advancing solid electrolytes and high-energy battery architectures to deliver improved safety, higher energy density and longer cycle life compared with traditional lithium-ion batteries.

The company's core offerings include multilayer solid-state battery cells that utilize sulfide-based solid electrolytes and high-capacity cathode materials.

The article " Solid Power Q4 Earnings Call Highlights " was originally published by MarketBeat.
news.AI_Summary:
• Solid Power outlined progress on its electrolyte sampling strategy and development roadmap, emphasizing financial discipline.
• The company continued providing multiple generations of electrolyte material to customers and executed a Joint Evaluation Agreement with Samsung SDI and BMW.
• BMW demonstrated solid-state battery technology in a test vehicle, highlighting Solid Power's role in the partnership.
• Solid Power plans to pursue a commercial-scale electrolyte production partnership in Korea in 2026 and is working with SK On on line validation.
news.Keywords: Solid Power Electrolyte Sampling, Solid-State Battery, BMW Partnership, SK On Collaboration, Continuous Pilot Line

news.Title: 台股收盤站穩3萬5千點　台積電股價破2015大關
news.Content:
即時中心／連國程報導
台股今（25）日開盤一口氣衝破3萬5千點大關，再創新高，終場以35413.07點作收，站穩35000大關。美股在科技股帶動下全面反彈，台積電ADR大漲4.25％，激勵台積電股價一度衝至2025元，收在2015元，漲幅2.54%。
權值股大漲 台塑四寶表現亮眼 今日台股大紅，台股權值股全數大漲，台積電上漲35元，股價來到2000元，再度寫歷史新高；鴻海漲9.5元，股價來到241.5元，漲幅逾4％；聯發科1855元，漲幅1.4％。此外，台塑四寶全面點火，南亞日盤中一度衝上95.4元，穩居集團股王；台化、台塑以及台塑化也漲停。
記憶體族群熄火 低軌衛星題材降溫 另外，記憶體族群熄火，華邦電、南亞科下跌逾4%；PCB族群漲跌互見，欣興、景碩平盤附近震盪，受惠於低軌衛星題材的華通下跌近8%，南電漲逾5%，尖點、台光電表現出色。
《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。
原文出處： 快新聞／台股收盤站穩3萬5千點 台積電股價破2015大關

news.Title: 台股衝4萬點？券商公會理事長陳俊宏：樂觀以對
news.Content:
台股漲勢強勁，25日登上35,000點歷史新高，邁向新里程碑。券商公會理事長陳俊宏指出，今年表現可望更勝去年，整體量價結構正向，看好台灣在AI發展扮演關鍵角色「無庸置疑」，半導體、電子零組件族群表現亮眼，對外界喊出台股衝4萬點「樂觀以對」。今年公會執行重點鎖定籲請政府研議建立合理證交稅率等八項要點，持續壯大台灣資本市場。
陳俊宏指出，台股2025年在基本面、資金面、政策面三面向俱到的優勢條件下，交出亮麗成績單，包括台股指數收在28,963點、上市櫃日均成交值5,309億元、上市櫃公司市值達百兆元，已居全球前八大交易市場。
展望新的一年，公會將致力於完備證券市場制度，全力發展證券商多元服務，今年已規劃八項工作重點，包括籲請政府研議建立合理證交稅率、協調證券業者組成「結構型或理財商品」工作模組、強化權證市場發展、積極推動分戶帳業務並鬆綁負債淨值倍數相關規定、完備投資人買賣海外有價證券服務功能、持續提升證券商數位服務品質並強化資安韌性、持續辦理防範金融詐騙宣導活動、精進教育訓練品質等。
陳俊宏指出，證券公會扮演主管機關、證券周邊單位和業者的溝通橋樑，將持續檢視金融環境變遷及瞭解業者實務運作所面臨的問題，並研議法規鬆綁或業務開放之相關配套，包括市場及業者的風險管控、利益衝突的防範及投資人權益的兼顧等面向，再向相關主管單位建議，希望藉由促進證券市場穩定發展之同時，也能提升證券業者經營效率及競爭力。

news.Title: 台積電收2015元新高 鴻海強漲逾6％ 台股收盤飆712點
news.Content:
即使昨（24日）天已經大漲超過900點，台股今（25日）仍展現超狂多頭氣勢，盤中一度大漲超過800點，尾盤漲勢雖略為收斂，但終場仍大漲712.25點，收在35,413.07點，改寫歷史新高，台積電盤中最高觸及2025元，最終上漲50元收在2015元，首度收在2000元之上，鴻海漲14.5元或6.25%，收在246.5元，廣達也上漲4.75%，收在297.5元。
記憶體族群則受到利空影響下殺，群聯下殺145元約7%，收在1925元，創見暴跌12.5元5.49%，收在215元，晶豪科也下跌12.5元5.49%，收在215元，威剛跌4.79%，華邦電與南亞科出現超過3%的跌勢，旺宏也收黑，力積電逆勢漲4.21%，收在76.8元。
針對台股後市，工商報導，永豐期貨認為，期現貨維持正價差，顯示市場對後續仍有延續期待，在實體AI真正大規模商轉、產業紅利全面反映之前，台灣硬體鏈還有肉，多頭趨勢沒有改變，只是節奏會加快、震盪會放大。
近期台日韓股市強勢大漲，顯示國際資金向亞洲傾斜，台股與美股也出現短暫脫鉤，本周仍要關注台灣周四清晨公開的輝達財報與財測，如果未能拉抬美股表現，亞洲股市屢創新高之後，漲多修正的壓力也就更大。

news.Title: 記憶體戰爭升級！美企瘋搶韓HBM人才 輝達開出逾800萬年薪 美光2倍薪+3億韓元挖腳
news.Content:
隨著 AI 算力需求爆發，記憶體在半導體領域的戰略地位驟升，美國科技巨頭正掀起針對南韓記憶體人才的高薪搶人大戰。
根據外媒報導，輝達、蘋果、聯發科、高通等科技大廠近期密集在南韓進行定向招聘，目標直指三星電子、SK 海力士的記憶體工程師。
輝達本月發布 HBM 開發工程師職位，基本年薪達 25.875 萬美元 (約 818 萬台幣)，蘋果上月招攬 NAND 產品工程師，年薪 30.56 萬美元 (約 965 萬台幣)，聯發科也開出約 26 萬美元找 HBM 工程師，高通同樣開始在南韓招募 3D DRAM 研發人員。
美國企業攻勢更趨激進，谷歌、博通在矽谷擴大招募 HBM 人才，分別招募性能評估工程師與高頻介面設計專家，特斯拉執行長馬斯克親自轉發南韓分公司 AI 半導體設計師招聘，美光自去年下半年起也在南韓挖角，據傳為核心 HBM 專家開出現有薪資兩倍及 3 億韓元簽約的優資條件。
面對人才流失危機，三星與 SK 海力士被迫加碼激勵。SK 海力士今年初發放創紀錄獎金，金額為月薪的 2964%，三星半導體部門則以年度總薪資 47% 的獎金回應，均為 AI 記憶體熱潮以來最高水平。
業界分析指出，這場人才競爭本質是 AI 算力競賽的延伸，南韓記憶體巨頭必須在技術研發與留住人才之間尋找平衡。

news.Title: Forget D-Wave Quantum: This Big Tech AI Leader Is Quietly Building the Stronger Moat
news.Content:
Quantum computing stocks like D-Wave Quantum and IonQ are promising breakthroughs that could reshape industries. But, for now, commercial deployments of these quantum computing solutions remain limited, while pure-play companies earn modest revenue and are not yet profitable. Hence, although quantum computing technology may prove transformative over time, investors may have to wait years to see it meaningfully solving real-world problems at scale.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Instead, investors can pay attention to a far more established technology leader with significant exposure to quantum innovation and is backed by a profitable, AI-driven enterprise business generating cash today. That company is International Business Machines (NYSE: IBM) .

IBM has been investing in quantum computing hardware and software for the past few decades.

In late 2025, the company deployed the first 120-qubit Nighthawk system for client use. Qubits are the basic units of quantum information and can process more complex calculations than traditional bits.

Management has claimed that IBM is on track to achieve "quantum advantage," or develop a quantum system capable of solving specific problems better than classical computing systems, by the end of 2026. The company is also aiming to develop a large-scale, fault-tolerant computer capable of running complex calculations with built-in error corrections by 2029.

While these milestones are impressive, they show that even for IBM, quantum computing is not yet a major near-term growth catalyst. However, IBM is not dependent on quantum computing to support its financial performance at least for the next few years. Instead, quantum computing offers a long-term upside opportunity within a much larger, profitable business.

In the fourth quarter, IBM's software revenue was up 14% year over year to $9 billion. Software now accounts for almost 46% of the company's total revenue, highlighting its shift toward a more software-led model. The company also exited fiscal 2025 with $23.6 billion in annual recurring revenue, underlining the strength of its subscription business.

IBM generated $14.7 billion in free cash flows in fiscal 2025. The company is guiding for nearly $15.7 billion in free cash flow in 2026, giving it sufficient flexibility to fund dividends and acquisitions.

Artificial intelligence (AI) is already proving to be a meaningful growth engine for IBM. In fact, management refers to the company as "a software-led, hybrid cloud and AI platform" company.

The company reported that its cumulative generative AI book of business is worth over $12.5 billion, including over $2 billion in software and more than $10.5 billion in consulting engagements. Hence, IBM is benefiting from clients shifting from experimentation to real-time AI deployments.

This traction is not driven by a single product. IBM's entire AI stack is benefiting as enterprises deploy AI to improve productivity, resilience, and flexibility across hybrid cloud environments. This includes the watsonx suite, IBM's AI and data platform for building and deploying enterprise AI solutions, and the Red Hat OpenShift platform that enables customers to run AI workloads consistently across hybrid cloud environments , including on-premise systems, public clouds, and the edge. IBM is also focusing on the agentic AI opportunity with its Orchestrate platform, which enables enterprises to deploy AI agents that can autonomously execute multistep business workflows.

This platform strategy is a crucial part of IBM's competitive moat. The company's plans to acquire data streaming player Confluent for an enterprise value of $11 billion further reinforces this strategy. If completed, this deal will give IBM's AI agents access to live enterprise data across applications, cloud, and application programming interfaces in a controlled, secure, and governed manner.

Management expects nearly 50% of enterprise AI usage to reside either in private clouds or on-premise data centers over the next three to five years. IBM is well-positioned to benefit from this opportunity, as its platform solutions can run efficiently in hybrid environments while giving enterprises the control and sovereignty required for sensitive AI workloads.

IBM is trading at 19.2 times forward earnings, which seems reasonable for a stable, cash-generating technology company with a 2.6% dividend yield.

While it may not provide the explosive upside like a successful quantum computing pure-play company in the long run, IBM provides a much more balanced exposure to quantum computing research, AI monetization, recurring software revenue, and strong free cash flows.

Hence, IBM may offer a more attractive risk-reward proposition for long-term investors.
news.AI_Summary:
• IBM is investing in quantum computing hardware and software, aiming for 'quantum advantage' by the end of 2026.
• The company's software revenue was up 14% year-over-year to $9 billion in Q4, now accounting for almost 46% of total revenue.
• IBM generated $14.7 billion in free cash flow in fiscal 2025 and forecasts nearly $15.7 billion for 2026.
• IBM's AI stack, including watsonx and Red Hat OpenShift, is benefiting from enterprises deploying AI for productivity and hybrid cloud environments.
news.Keywords: IBM Quantum Computing, Software Revenue Growth, Free Cash Flow, AI Stack, Hybrid Cloud, Agentic AI

news.Title: Navitas Semiconductor Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
news.Content:
Strategic pivot: Navitas shifted focus to high-power markets (AI data centers, grid, performance computing, industrial electrification), which made up the majority of Q4 revenue while mobile fell to <25% and is expected to become "insignificant" by end-2026.

Q4 results and restructuring: Q4 revenue was $7.3M (down from $10.1M) and included a $16.6M restructuring/impairment charge; management said Q4 likely represented the revenue "bottom," cash was about $237M with no debt, and Q1 2026 guidance is $8.0–$8.5M.

Product and manufacturing progress: Navitas is accelerating GaN and high-voltage SiC sampling for AI and grid applications (including a 10 kW all‑GaN 800V→50V platform at 98.5% peak efficiency) and has a long‑term manufacturing partnership with GlobalFoundries to scale U.S. GaN production starting late 2026/2027.

Interested in Navitas Semiconductor Corporation? Here are five stocks we like better.

Small Names, Big Impact: The Stocks Behind NVIDIA’s Rubin

Navitas Semiconductor (NASDAQ:NVTS) said it ended 2025 with fourth-quarter revenue at the high end of guidance as the company accelerated its “Navitas 2.0” transformation, a strategic pivot away from its historical mobile and low-end consumer business toward higher-power end markets such as AI data centers and grid infrastructure.

Management emphasized that the company’s fourth-quarter results were preliminary and unaudited, with final results expected to be provided in its Form 10-K.

→ Hinge Health’s AI Moat Might Be Its Patient Movement Data

Navitas Soars 78% on NVIDIA Update: Is This Rally Sustainable?

President and CEO Chris Allexandre said the company is “laser-focused” on four high-growth segments: AI data center, energy and grid infrastructure, performance computing, and industrial electrification. He described AI as an underlying catalyst across these markets, driving new power architectures and increasing adoption of gallium nitride (GaN) and high-voltage silicon carbide (SiC) technologies.

Allexandre said the company has completed an organizational realignment—by skills and geography—to focus on high-power markets. He also noted that Navitas has shipped more than 300 million GaN devices over a 10-year period and is leveraging GeneSiC technology for high-voltage SiC.

→ Gold and Silver Pulled Back—Here’s Why the Bull Case Is Intact

Insiders Trade Millions in NVIDIA-Linked Navitas, Hims, & Shift4

A key milestone in the quarter was that high-power markets represented the majority of quarterly revenue for the first time, while the mobile business fell to less than 25% of revenue. Management said it expects mobile to continue declining as a percentage of revenue and to become “insignificant” by the end of 2026.

In AI data centers, Allexandre said Navitas is supporting multiple architectures and has accelerated product sampling of 100V and 650V GaN for 800V HVDC and 48V intermediate bus converter (IBC) and high-voltage buck designs. He said samples are available in different package types and are being evaluated by more than a dozen customers.

→ Opendoor Pops After Earnings, But the Big Question Hasn’t Changed

Navitas highlighted a February 9 announcement of a 10 kW, all-GaN, 800V-to-50V DC-DC design platform. The company said the platform delivered 98.5% peak efficiency and is intended to support ±400V VDC standards used in AI data centers. In the Q&A, Allexandre characterized the platform as an enabling reference implementation co-developed with a customer, stating the company is not currently planning to sell complete brick-level modules and does not intend to compete with its customers.

On the SiC side for AI data centers, management said it is active supporting customers’ AC-DC power supply unit (PSU) designs using 1.2 kV SiC devices and highlighted its latest GeneSiC technology and top-side cooled D2PAK packaging.

For grid and energy infrastructure, Allexandre described a “multi-decade” modernization cycle and said Navitas is seeing accelerated design cycles. The company said it is sampling 2.3 kV and 3.3 kV ultra-high-voltage SiC modules and is in evaluation with more than 50 OEMs globally, “mostly in the U.S. and Europe,” with acceleration in the U.S. In a later Q&A exchange, Allexandre discussed solid-state transformers and other grid-tied applications, and said the company expects significant revenue growth in grid-related areas starting in 2027 due to longer design cycles.

In performance computing, management said it is seeing increased GaN adoption in high-power chargers and power units for high-end computing and AI notebooks, with “more than 15 projects” in production and roughly twice that number in design across power levels up to 360W. Industrial electrification traction was described as emerging across applications such as industrial pumps, AV equipment electrification, DC-DC converters, and megawatt chargers.

CFO Todd Glickman reported fourth-quarter 2025 revenue of $7.3 million, down from $10.1 million in the third quarter. He attributed the decline to the company’s decision to deprioritize low-power, lower-profit China mobile and consumer business and to streamline the distribution network to align with high-power markets. Both Glickman and Allexandre said they believe the fourth quarter represented the “bottom” for revenue.

Glickman said the company’s GAAP results included a $16.6 million restructuring and impairment charge, consisting of:

$10 million of distribution contract terminations

$4 million of fixed asset impairments

$2 million of workforce reduction expenses

He said $3.8 million of the charge was non-cash.

On a non-GAAP basis, Glickman reported gross margin of 38.7% in the fourth quarter, flat sequentially. He said that at current revenue levels the company does not yet have sufficient scale to overcome fixed costs, but expects this to improve as high-power revenue grows and mix shifts away from mobile and low-end consumer products.

Non-GAAP operating expenses were $14.9 million, down from $15.4 million in the third quarter, following a 19% workforce reduction largely in mobile and consumer roles and an organizational shift toward U.S.-based high-power markets. Operating expenses included SG&A of $6.8 million and R&D of $8.1 million. Non-GAAP loss from operations was $12.1 million, compared with $11.5 million in the prior quarter. Weighted average shares were approximately 222 million in the quarter.

For the full year 2025, the company reported revenue of $45.9 million, down from $83.3 million in 2024, and gross margin of 38.4% versus 40.4% a year earlier. Operating expenses were $63.6 million compared with $83.4 million in 2024, and full-year loss from operations was $46.0 million versus $49.7 million the prior year.

Glickman said accounts receivable declined to $3.6 million from $9.8 million, with days sales outstanding of 45 days. Inventory decreased to $13.3 million from $14.7 million. Cash and cash equivalents ended the quarter at approximately $237 million, reflecting net proceeds of about $96 million from a November private placement of common stock. The company said it has no debt.

Operationally, Allexandre highlighted a long-term technology and manufacturing partnership with GlobalFoundries to accelerate GaN design and manufacturing in the U.S. Development began “a few weeks ago,” with production expected to begin later in 2026 and accelerate in 2027. Over time, the company expects to transition to 8-inch manufacturing to lower costs and increase scale. Navitas also consolidated distribution partners from roughly 40 to fewer than 10 as part of its go-to-market restructuring.

For the first quarter of 2026, the company guided to revenue of $8.0 million to $8.5 million, implying sequential growth. It expects gross margin of 38.7% plus or minus 25 basis points and operating expenses of approximately $15 million. The company expects weighted average shares of about 230 million in Q1.

During the call, Allexandre also said Glickman will step down after 10 years as CFO and will assist with a transition until a successor is named. The company said it expects to provide an update on its CFO search in the coming weeks.

Navitas Semiconductor is a fabless semiconductor company specialized in gallium nitride (GaN) power integrated circuits. The company’s core mission centers on delivering high-efficiency, high-power-density power solutions that address the needs of modern electronic devices, ranging from fast chargers for consumer electronics to industrial and automotive power systems.

Navitas offers a portfolio of GaNFast power ICs designed to replace traditional silicon-based power components. These products integrate GaN transistors, drivers and protection features into single-chip solutions, enabling faster charging, reduced energy loss and smaller power supply footprints.

The article " Navitas Semiconductor Q4 Earnings Call Highlights " was originally published by MarketBeat.

news.Title: Navitas Semiconductor Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
news.Content:
Strategic pivot: Navitas shifted focus to high-power markets (AI data centers, grid, performance computing, industrial electrification), which made up the majority of Q4 revenue while mobile fell to <25% and is expected to become "insignificant" by end-2026.

Q4 results and restructuring: Q4 revenue was $7.3M (down from $10.1M) and included a $16.6M restructuring/impairment charge; management said Q4 likely represented the revenue "bottom," cash was about $237M with no debt, and Q1 2026 guidance is $8.0–$8.5M.

Product and manufacturing progress: Navitas is accelerating GaN and high-voltage SiC sampling for AI and grid applications (including a 10 kW all‑GaN 800V→50V platform at 98.5% peak efficiency) and has a long‑term manufacturing partnership with GlobalFoundries to scale U.S. GaN production starting late 2026/2027.

Interested in Navitas Semiconductor Corporation? Here are five stocks we like better.

Small Names, Big Impact: The Stocks Behind NVIDIA’s Rubin

Navitas Semiconductor (NASDAQ:NVTS) said it ended 2025 with fourth-quarter revenue at the high end of guidance as the company accelerated its “Navitas 2.0” transformation, a strategic pivot away from its historical mobile and low-end consumer business toward higher-power end markets such as AI data centers and grid infrastructure.

Management emphasized that the company’s fourth-quarter results were preliminary and unaudited, with final results expected to be provided in its Form 10-K.

→ Hinge Health’s AI Moat Might Be Its Patient Movement Data

Navitas Soars 78% on NVIDIA Update: Is This Rally Sustainable?

President and CEO Chris Allexandre said the company is “laser-focused” on four high-growth segments: AI data center, energy and grid infrastructure, performance computing, and industrial electrification. He described AI as an underlying catalyst across these markets, driving new power architectures and increasing adoption of gallium nitride (GaN) and high-voltage silicon carbide (SiC) technologies.

Allexandre said the company has completed an organizational realignment—by skills and geography—to focus on high-power markets. He also noted that Navitas has shipped more than 300 million GaN devices over a 10-year period and is leveraging GeneSiC technology for high-voltage SiC.

→ Gold and Silver Pulled Back—Here’s Why the Bull Case Is Intact

Insiders Trade Millions in NVIDIA-Linked Navitas, Hims, & Shift4

A key milestone in the quarter was that high-power markets represented the majority of quarterly revenue for the first time, while the mobile business fell to less than 25% of revenue. Management said it expects mobile to continue declining as a percentage of revenue and to become “insignificant” by the end of 2026.

In AI data centers, Allexandre said Navitas is supporting multiple architectures and has accelerated product sampling of 100V and 650V GaN for 800V HVDC and 48V intermediate bus converter (IBC) and high-voltage buck designs. He said samples are available in different package types and are being evaluated by more than a dozen customers.

→ Opendoor Pops After Earnings, But the Big Question Hasn’t Changed

Navitas highlighted a February 9 announcement of a 10 kW, all-GaN, 800V-to-50V DC-DC design platform. The company said the platform delivered 98.5% peak efficiency and is intended to support ±400V VDC standards used in AI data centers. In the Q&A, Allexandre characterized the platform as an enabling reference implementation co-developed with a customer, stating the company is not currently planning to sell complete brick-level modules and does not intend to compete with its customers.

On the SiC side for AI data centers, management said it is active supporting customers’ AC-DC power supply unit (PSU) designs using 1.2 kV SiC devices and highlighted its latest GeneSiC technology and top-side cooled D2PAK packaging.

For grid and energy infrastructure, Allexandre described a “multi-decade” modernization cycle and said Navitas is seeing accelerated design cycles. The company said it is sampling 2.3 kV and 3.3 kV ultra-high-voltage SiC modules and is in evaluation with more than 50 OEMs globally, “mostly in the U.S. and Europe,” with acceleration in the U.S. In a later Q&A exchange, Allexandre discussed solid-state transformers and other grid-tied applications, and said the company expects significant revenue growth in grid-related areas starting in 2027 due to longer design cycles.

In performance computing, management said it is seeing increased GaN adoption in high-power chargers and power units for high-end computing and AI notebooks, with “more than 15 projects” in production and roughly twice that number in design across power levels up to 360W. Industrial electrification traction was described as emerging across applications such as industrial pumps, AV equipment electrification, DC-DC converters, and megawatt chargers.

CFO Todd Glickman reported fourth-quarter 2025 revenue of $7.3 million, down from $10.1 million in the third quarter. He attributed the decline to the company’s decision to deprioritize low-power, lower-profit China mobile and consumer business and to streamline the distribution network to align with high-power markets. Both Glickman and Allexandre said they believe the fourth quarter represented the “bottom” for revenue.

Glickman said the company’s GAAP results included a $16.6 million restructuring and impairment charge, consisting of:

$10 million of distribution contract terminations

$4 million of fixed asset impairments

$2 million of workforce reduction expenses

He said $3.8 million of the charge was non-cash.

On a non-GAAP basis, Glickman reported gross margin of 38.7% in the fourth quarter, flat sequentially. He said that at current revenue levels the company does not yet have sufficient scale to overcome fixed costs, but expects this to improve as high-power revenue grows and mix shifts away from mobile and low-end consumer products.

Non-GAAP operating expenses were $14.9 million, down from $15.4 million in the third quarter, following a 19% workforce reduction largely in mobile and consumer roles and an organizational shift toward U.S.-based high-power markets. Operating expenses included SG&A of $6.8 million and R&D of $8.1 million. Non-GAAP loss from operations was $12.1 million, compared with $11.5 million in the prior quarter. Weighted average shares were approximately 222 million in the quarter.

For the full year 2025, the company reported revenue of $45.9 million, down from $83.3 million in 2024, and gross margin of 38.4% versus 40.4% a year earlier. Operating expenses were $63.6 million compared with $83.4 million in 2024, and full-year loss from operations was $46.0 million versus $49.7 million the prior year.

Glickman said accounts receivable declined to $3.6 million from $9.8 million, with days sales outstanding of 45 days. Inventory decreased to $13.3 million from $14.7 million. Cash and cash equivalents ended the quarter at approximately $237 million, reflecting net proceeds of about $96 million from a November private placement of common stock. The company said it has no debt.

Operationally, Allexandre highlighted a long-term technology and manufacturing partnership with GlobalFoundries to accelerate GaN design and manufacturing in the U.S. Development began “a few weeks ago,” with production expected to begin later in 2026 and accelerate in 2027. Over time, the company expects to transition to 8-inch manufacturing to lower costs and increase scale. Navitas also consolidated distribution partners from roughly 40 to fewer than 10 as part of its go-to-market restructuring.

For the first quarter of 2026, the company guided to revenue of $8.0 million to $8.5 million, implying sequential growth. It expects gross margin of 38.7% plus or minus 25 basis points and operating expenses of approximately $15 million. The company expects weighted average shares of about 230 million in Q1.

During the call, Allexandre also said Glickman will step down after 10 years as CFO and will assist with a transition until a successor is named. The company said it expects to provide an update on its CFO search in the coming weeks.

Navitas Semiconductor is a fabless semiconductor company specialized in gallium nitride (GaN) power integrated circuits. The company’s core mission centers on delivering high-efficiency, high-power-density power solutions that address the needs of modern electronic devices, ranging from fast chargers for consumer electronics to industrial and automotive power systems.

Navitas offers a portfolio of GaNFast power ICs designed to replace traditional silicon-based power components. These products integrate GaN transistors, drivers and protection features into single-chip solutions, enabling faster charging, reduced energy loss and smaller power supply footprints.

news.Title: Lucid Group Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
news.Content:
Lucid roughly doubled production in 2025 with Q4 production of 7,874 vehicles and full-year 70,840 , and Gravity accounted for the majority of Q4 deliveries, though 538 units were reclassified to 2026 after failing to meet factory-gate procedures.

Lucid secured a $300 million investment from Uber and is partnering with Uber and Nuro to produce a robotaxi version of the Gravity, targeting at least 20,000 vehicles with Bay Area testing and commercial deployment slated for 2026.

Q4 revenue rose to $522.7M (FY $1.35B ) with an ~ 18-point sequential gross-margin improvement and ~ $4.6B in liquidity; 2026 guidance calls for 25,000–27,000 vehicles, $1.2–1.4B CapEx, a runway into the first half of 2027 , and a 12% U.S. workforce reduction expected to save ~ $500M over three years.

Interested in Lucid Group, Inc.? Here are five stocks we like better.

America’s New Favorite EV Isn’t Tesla—and the Stock May Surprise

Lucid Group (NASDAQ:LCID) used its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings call to outline progress in production scaling, the ramp of its Gravity SUV, and steps taken to improve unit economics amid what interim CEO Marc Winterhoff described as “extraordinary macro turbulences,” including higher tariffs, the roll-off of federal incentives, shifting EV demand, and supply chain disruptions. Management also detailed its robotaxi partnership with Uber and Nuro, provided 2026 production and capital spending guidance, and discussed cost actions intended to extend liquidity runway into the first half of 2027.

Winterhoff said Lucid “about doubled” annual production in 2025 and highlighted a doubling of production from the third to the fourth quarter as evidence its manufacturing system can scale when supply constraints ease. CFO Taoufiq Boussaid reported fourth-quarter production of 7,874 vehicles , up 133% year-over-year, and full-year production of 70,840 vehicles , up 98% year-over-year.

→ Hinge Health’s AI Moat Might Be Its Patient Movement Data

3 Recently Downgraded Stocks to Avoid in 2026

Lucid said it improved throughput, reduced rework, and built more repeatable processes during the year. Winterhoff also said the company overcame early quality issues that affected the Gravity ramp, noting problems were related to hardware but “even more so related to software.” He said Lucid rolled out new software to Gravity vehicles in the current month that addressed “a large number” of customer concerns.

Lucid also disclosed a revision to previously announced production figures. Winterhoff said the company determined that 538 vehicles that had been counted as factory-gated at its AMP-2 facility in Saudi Arabia in the last week of 2025 did not complete certain procedures required to meet Lucid’s standards for being counted as factory-gated. Those units—built in Arizona, shipped as kits to Saudi Arabia, and reassembled—are now expected to be considered factory-gated in 2026 instead. Management said the change had no impact on customer deliveries and that additional steps are being taken to ensure accuracy going forward.

→ Gold and Silver Pulled Back—Here’s Why the Bull Case Is Intact

Uber Is Crushing Lyft—And It’s Not Even Close

Boussaid said fourth-quarter deliveries were 5,345 vehicles , up 72% year-over-year, marking Lucid’s eighth consecutive record quarter . Full-year deliveries were 15,841 vehicles , up 55% year-over-year. Both Winterhoff and Boussaid said Gravity represented the majority of deliveries in the fourth quarter, contributing to a higher average selling price.

Operationally, Boussaid said Lucid shifted to a more targeted build-to-stock approach to reduce delivery times for specific trims and configurations. He reported days on hand in December of 108 , which he characterized as within the industry range, and said the figure is expected to trend down in the first quarter of 2026. He also emphasized pricing discipline, stating Lucid will not “chase volume at the expense of margin.”

→ Opendoor Pops After Earnings, But the Big Question Hasn’t Changed

On commercial and brand momentum, Winterhoff cited multiple awards for the Gravity and Air and said the company expanded studio and service capacity. He said Lucid increased service lift capacity by 40% in the U.S. and Canada and unlocked access to more than 27,500 Tesla Superchargers in North America. Winterhoff also highlighted the launch of Lucid Recharged , the company’s certified pre-owned program, in December.

Lucid described autonomy as both a consumer feature and a way to enter the robotaxi market. Winterhoff said the company’s approach is designed to be executed “in the shortest time possible with limited capital expenditure” and argued it expands Lucid’s total addressable market, citing an estimate of $700 billion by 2035 when including robotaxis.

As previously announced, Lucid is working with Uber and Nuro on a robotaxi based on the Gravity and Nuro’s Level 4 autonomy stack, with a plan to deploy at least 20,000 vehicles on Uber’s platform. Winterhoff said Lucid closed a $300 million investment from Uber in the third quarter and began delivering engineering vehicles for evaluation, with on-road testing starting in the San Francisco Bay Area in the fourth quarter. He said the Bay Area is expected to be the first deployment area later in 2026.

In Q&A, management said the current Uber/Nuro arrangement is structured as a vehicle sale and does not include additional licensing or subscription revenue. Boussaid said robotaxi testing is underway and reiterated that commercial deployment is on track for 2026, adding that the agreement provides demand visibility that can help production planning and fixed-cost absorption over time.

Lucid also outlined an autonomy roadmap for customer vehicles: point-to-point autonomy in Gravity late 2026 , L3 targeted for 2028 , and L4 targeted for 2029 , starting with mid-size vehicles. Management said additional details, including rollout cadence and pricing, will be discussed at its Investor Day on March 12.

Lucid reported fourth-quarter revenue of $522.7 million , up 55% sequentially and 123% year-over-year, with full-year revenue of $1.35 billion , up 68% year-over-year. Boussaid said the company exceeded consensus expectations in both the quarter and full year, attributing growth to higher deliveries and higher ASPs.

Gross margin improved by approximately 18 points sequentially in the fourth quarter, driven by higher volume, improved fixed-cost absorption, a richer Gravity mix, yield gains, lower scrap, and logistics and material cost optimizations. Management said results were partially offset by incremental tariffs, “transitory ramp inefficiencies,” and inventory impairments. Boussaid also said Lucid incurred incremental tariffs of approximately $10,000 per unit in 2025 that it does not expect in 2026.

Lucid’s operating expenses in the fourth quarter were $643 million , up 6% sequentially, while revenue grew 55% sequentially. R&D expense was $361 million , and SG&A was $282 million . Operating loss was $1.065 billion , and adjusted EBITDA loss was $875 million . During Q&A, Boussaid corrected a statement from prepared remarks, saying adjusted EBITDA margin improved by 46 percentage points from the prior quarter.

Liquidity at quarter-end was approximately $4.6 billion , including $2.1 billion in cash and $2.5 billion in undrawn committed facilities. Capital expenditures were $325 million , up 64% from the prior quarter. Free cash flow was negative $1.2 billion , driven by ramp-related operating losses, working capital tied to production and mix shift, and CapEx.

For 2026, Lucid guided to production of 25,000 to 27,000 vehicles and projected CapEx of $1.2 billion to $1.4 billion . Boussaid said, under its current plan and CapEx profile, the company’s runway extends into the first half of 2027 . Management said most 2026 production and deliveries are expected to be Gravity, with “no meaningful” mid-size volumes given expected start of production late in the year, and only a small number of robotaxi vehicles in 2026.

Lucid also said it implemented a 12% reduction of its U.S. workforce (excluding hourly production employees in manufacturing, logistics, and quality). Management said the move is expected to deliver approximately $500 million in cumulative cost savings over three years, with severance outflows in 2026. In response to a question on cadence, Boussaid indicated the savings should be viewed as roughly $500 million divided over three years.

On manufacturing efficiency, Boussaid said manufacturing cost per vehicle produced (including manufacturing and logistics, labor, and overhead) declined approximately 27% during 2025, and the company is targeting roughly an additional 20% reduction in manufacturing cost per unit by the fourth quarter of 2026. He also said Lucid exited the quarter with an underlying run rate supporting up to 7,500 vehicles per quarter .

Management indicated additional strategy details—covering profitability, autonomy plans, and the mid-size platform—will be provided at Lucid’s Investor Day on March 12. In Q&A, Winterhoff said there were no updates on when the board plans to appoint a permanent CEO.

Lucid Group, Inc is a California-based electric vehicle manufacturer specializing in the design, engineering and production of luxury electric sedans. Its flagship model, the Lucid Air, features a proprietary battery and powertrain architecture that emphasizes energy efficiency, extended driving range and high performance. In addition to passenger vehicles, Lucid offers charging solutions and software-enabled services aimed at optimizing the ownership experience and accelerating adoption of zero-emission transportation.

The company was founded in 2007 under the name Atieva, initially focusing on battery technology and electric powertrains for other automakers before transitioning to its own branded vehicles.

The article " Lucid Group Q4 Earnings Call Highlights " was originally published by MarketBeat.
news.AI_Summary:
• Lucid roughly doubled production in 2025, with Q4 production at 7,874 vehicles and full-year production at 70,840.
• The Gravity SUV accounted for the majority of Q4 deliveries, though 538 units were reclassified to 2026.
• Lucid secured a $300 million investment from Uber and is partnering for a robotaxi version of the Gravity, targeting 20,000 vehicles.
• Q4 revenue rose to $522.7 million, with an 18-point sequential gross-margin improvement and ~$4.6 billion in liquidity.
news.Keywords: Lucid Production, Gravity SUV, Uber Partnership, Robotaxi, Q4 Revenue, Gross Margin Improvement

news.Title: Samsung’s update screen is sending the wrong message after a Google patch
news.Content:
Samsung (SSNLF) users are growing suspicious. And for good reason. Users are jumpy whenever you mention anything related to security . For the users, it looks like anything that is coming up from the point of "security" these days leads them backward, causing anxiety.

That is exactly what Samsung users are getting right now. A second Google Play system update arrived one day after the first , accompanied by a version/date label that, for some devices, appeared to go back on the changes introduced from January 2026 to November 2025 .

What is the positive news for Google users? The tech giant says the scary-looking part is largely cosmetic.

Galaxy phone received the Jan. 1 Google Play system update after a large, unusual gap. Galaxy users also needed to contend with a notably bigger download on some devices (it cited 90MB on a Galaxy S23).

Then, on Feb. 20 , a second Google Play system update started to hit Galaxy phones globally, just 1.3MB , leading to a very rare two-day streak.
news.AI_Summary:
• Samsung users are experiencing anxiety due to a second Google Play system update that appears to revert changes.
• The update, which followed a larger January update, has a smaller download size but raises security concerns.
• Google states the 'scary-looking part' is largely cosmetic, but users are suspicious about the security implications.
• The timing and nature of the updates have led to user distrust regarding Google's security practices.
news.Keywords: Samsung Google Update, Security Concerns, Play Store Update, User Anxiety, Cosmetic Changes

news.Title: The AI Stock That Insiders Are Loading Up On for 2026
news.Content:
Insider buying is one of the best indicators of how a stock might perform in the future.

The people running a company or who sit on its board of directors know it best. How could they not? They know things an investor couldn't, like sales figures since the last quarterly report or total intangibles you can't put on a spreadsheet, like office morale.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

It was once put very succinctly by investing legend Peter Lynch: "Insiders might sell their shares for any number of reasons, but they buy them for only one: they think the price will rise."

So, if you're worried about an artificial intelligence (AI) bubble and want to know which AI companies are the real deal versus those facing a rude awakening if/when any AI bubble pops, look at what the insiders at AI companies are doing with their money.

And there is one AI company that has seen some rather promising insider activity in recent months.

Salesforce (NYSE: CRM) is a fundamentally strong company, but its shares have had a rough go on the market recently. The company is down 30% year to date (as of Feb. 19.

There hasn't been much insider activity recently, only four transactions with two buys and two sells, but what is there is interesting.

First was Harris Parker, the company's co-founder. His sale of $31.6 million in shares in December 2025 may look alarming at first, but that transaction was part of a 10b5-1 plan, which means it was pre-planned and unrelated to Salesforce's performance.

The only other sale (and the only discretionary sale) was from Neelie Kroes, former VP of the European Commission and a longtime Salesforce director. She sold 3,893 shares for a total of $929,276 in January 2026. As I mentioned before, though, sales like that could be for any number of reasons.

On to the buyers, with two interesting transactions.

The smaller purchase involved Kirk David Blair, a company director. He bought 1,936 shares for a total of $500,722 in mid-December 2025. That's a serious vote of confidence in where Salesforce is headed in its near future.

But the biggest play was from Mason Morfit, another director and the co-chief executive officer and chief investment officer of the investment firm ValueAct Capital with $10 billion in assets under management. Or rather, his firm bought some Salesforce stock.

ValueAct purchased $25 million worth of Salesforce shares on Dec. 5 , showing serious confidence in Salesforce's future.

So, excluding the 10b5-1 sales, which didn't concern Salesforce as a company, there's net insider buying totaling just shy of $24.6 million in the past three months.

With that in mind, I am very interested in Salesforce's fiscal 2026 results, which are due to be released on Feb. 25, and its spring 2026 product release on Feb. 23, 2026, when it plans to introduce new agentic capabilities and an AI-powered Sales Workspace, among other things.

Just because company insiders know more than outside investors about what's going on behind the scenes doesn't mean they're right about everything. High insider buying activity isn't a foolproof indicator. However, combined with Salesforce's fundamental strength, I would recommend giving this one a look.
news.AI_Summary:
• Salesforce (CRM) shares are down 30% year-to-date, but insiders have shown recent buying activity.
• Director Kirk David Blair bought $500,722 in shares, and ValueAct Capital purchased $25 million worth of Salesforce shares.
• These purchases, excluding pre-planned sales, indicate significant insider confidence in Salesforce's future.
• Salesforce is set to release its fiscal 2026 results and introduce new agentic capabilities and an AI-powered Sales Workspace.
news.Keywords: Salesforce Insider Buying, Director Purchases, ValueAct Capital Investment, AI Capabilities, Fiscal 2026 Results

news.Title: 「台股5萬點不是問題！」券商公會理事長陳俊宏：跟我體脂肪一樣
news.Content:
台股今（25）日氣勢如虹，盤中一舉衝破3萬5大關，最高觸及35521點，再寫新高。對此，元富證券董事長、中華民國證券商業同業公會理事長陳俊宏受訪時直言，台股後市樂觀可期，「5萬點不是問題」，還幽默補上一句：「跟我的體脂肪一樣！」
陳俊宏分享近期有朋友跟他說台股「5萬點不是問題」，他問朋友為什麼，朋友回說，近期美股道瓊工業指數首破5萬點關卡之際，美國總統川普就預測任期內將漲至10萬點，「川普都喊到10萬點了，台股有什麼困難。」
不過，陳俊宏也強調，台股能否攻上5萬點仍有先決條件。他指出，台灣在半導體與AI領域實力堅強毋庸置疑，甚至已有外資喊出台積電目標價3000元。以台積電股價每上漲1元，約帶動大盤8點推算，只要權王持續走高，「5萬點不是問題」，只是時間點未必在今年。
但川普都說任內道瓊指數有望挑戰10萬點，顯示市場對美股長線仍具期待。言下之意，台股與美股高度連動，只要美股維持多頭氣勢，台股登上5萬點只是時間早晚。
「我對台股很樂觀，跟我的體脂肪一樣。」陳俊宏笑說。他強調，雖然看好大盤續強，但也期待政府協助更多產業跟上成長腳步，不應只有AI、PCB與記憶體受惠，台灣還有許多產業值得投入更多資源與政策支持。
陳依旻／財經特派記者副組長，主跑央行、證交所、投信投顧等
